headline: Trump LOCKED & LOADED 💥🔫 to RESCUE Iran Protesters from Ayatollah SIMPS 🤡👑
text:
ORANGE MAN BADASS 🍊👨‍💼 DONALD J. TRUMP 🚀📱 dropping TRUTH BOMBS 💣 on Truth Social: 'Iran shoots peaceful protesters? USA COMING TO RESCUE 🦸‍♂️💨 like AVENGERS ENDGAME!' Locked & LOADED 🔒🍆 ready to GO BRRRRR 😤💥 after days of IRAN CHAOS 🔥🇮🇷 – shopkeepers RAGING 😡🛒 over RIAL TANKING 💸📉 worse than Biden's economy! Protests SPREADING 🗺️🚀 from Tehran to Lordegan, cars BURNING 🥵🚗💨, students CHANTING 👏 'DOWN WITH KHAMENEI 👴🦠 – GIMME MONARCHY 👑 back bby!' At least SIX BODIES 💀😢 dropped Thursday: Ahmad Jalil & Sajjad Valamanesh SLAYED 🔪 in Lordegan clashes, three in Azna, one in Kouhdasht – Fars News spilling tea ☕ but BBC like 'UNVERIFIED 👀' while protesters YEET security goons 🤡🚔!

Ayatollah's simp ADVISER Ali Larijani 😤📜 WARNING Trump: 'Meddle and we'll CHAOS the MIDEAST 🌪️🕌 – destroy your interests like we did that Qatar base MISSILE PARTY 🎆🇶🇦!' But Trump like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔😏' remembering June NUKE STRIKES 💣☢️ that SET BACK Iran's bomb dreams 🧨🚫 – Iran clapped back with missiles but got SCHOOLED 📚🔥! Khamenei crew THREATENING 'DECISIVE RESPONSE' 😠⚔️ while President Pezeshkian simping 'I LISTEN 👂 to demands' – TOO LATE bro, Mahsa Amini 2022 vibes RELOADING 🔄💥 but BIGGER ORGY OF RAGE 👥😡!

Trump channeling RAMBO 🦅🇺🇸: No deets on HOW we'll rescue – airstrikes? SEAL Team 6 drip? DRONE SWARM 🤖💨? – but Iran's clerical CLOWNS 🤡🕌 sweating BULLETS 💦🩸 knowing ORANGE DADDY 👑🍑 owns the skies! Protesters chanting ANTI-MULLAH SLURS 📣🚫, cars FLAMING 🔥🚗 in Marvdasht & Tehran street parties gone WILD 🥳💀 – morality police EAT SH*T 🤮🕵️‍♂️ after Amini veil drama! Larijani coping HARD 😩: 'This INTERNAL, stay out!' Nah fam, Trump says IF YOU KILL PEACERS ✌️😢, we INTERVENE like ELON fixing X 🚀🐦 – MIDEAST about to GET FREEDOM ORB 🌍🗽! Khamenei rule SHAKING 🍑😱, monarchy stans RISING 👑📈 – USA READY TO DROP THE HAMMER 🔨🇺🇸 on Tehran tyrants! 💥‼️
